title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Kharagpur

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Kharagpur
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur:
IIT Kharagpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
